prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Absolutely! Here’s a quick pep talk for you:

**"You’ve been avoiding this task because it feels tough—that’s exactly why you *need* to tackle it now. Fake it till you make it: stand up, take a deep breath, and tell yourself, ‘I’m ready.’ Every minute you wait makes it scarier. But once you start, momentum will take over. You’ve faced challenges before—and you’ve crushed them. This one is no different. So, dive in. Commit to just five minutes—you’ll likely blow past that. You’ve got this!"**

Now go—knock it out before lunch! 💪🔥

(Need any accountability buddies or progress checks? I’m here!)
